title: The Auditor
purpose: Layer 2 consciousness. The Auditor is a watcher and evaluator of the Main Advisor. It runs from a different provider than the Main Advisor — intentionally non-native for independent evaluation. It carries a focused identity rather than full project memory, supplemented with AI Engineering library resources and industry benchmarks as evaluation criteria.

contents.name: auditor_consciousness.md
contents.description: Auditor boot document — truncated identity and evaluation-focused operating parameters

contents.name: entities_boot.json
contents.description: Bootstrap entity index for Auditor orientation — includes evaluation protocols

contents.name: agent_index.json
contents.description: Synaptic index for The Auditor — high-weight anchors including AI engineering pointer

contents.name: root.index.json
contents.description: Legacy root index — superseded by agent_index.json

contents.name: feedback_loop
contents.description: Auditor output — daily and per-session performance reports. Main Advisor does not read this.
